This example includes a prefilled input for the "faded" blank in the code. This can be used for hints or placeholders. Complete the code that counts words whose length meets a minimum threshold. Note that there is also a distractor among the available blocks. def count_long_words(words, min_len): #pin count = 0 #pin(1) for word in words: #pin(1) if len(word) >= __(min_len)__: #pin(2) count += 1 count += min_len #distractor return count #pin(1)
